videos.headline: Dylan Sampson's 3rd TD walks it off for Tennessee in OT
videos.description: Dylan Sampson punches in his third touchdown of the game to seal Tennessee's OT win over Florida.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Dylan Sampson's 3rd TD walks it off for Tennessee in OT) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Graham Mertz coughs the ball up on the goal line
videos.description: Graham Mertz pulls it down and tries to force his way across the goal line, only to have the ball ripped out of his hands for a Florida fumble.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Graham Mertz coughs the ball up on the goal line) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Graham Mertz shaken up after throwing Florida TD
videos.description: Graham Mertz slams his helmet on the sideline after appearing to sustain an injury on a Florida touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Graham Mertz shaken up after throwing Florida TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson gets Tennessee on the board with a TD
videos.description: Dylan Sampson gets the Volunteers on the board with a rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Dylan Sampson gets Tennessee on the board with a TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Lagway gets picked on his first pass of the game
videos.description: DJ Lagway steps in for the Gators in place of Graham Mertz, only to have his first pass intercepted by Arion Carter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Lagway gets picked on his first pass of the game) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson puts Tennessee in front with his 2nd TD
videos.description: Dylan Sampson finds the end zone for a second time to put Tennessee in front of Florida.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson puts Tennessee in front with his 2nd TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida ties it up with a late touchdown
videos.description: DJ Lagway fires a dart to Chimere Dike in the end zone for a Gators touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Florida ties it up with a late touchdown) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
